Updates to Fees for Equity Perpetual Contracts
Wed, 15 Apr 2026 16:00:00 GMT
https://www.bitmex.com/blog/updated-fees-equity-perps
Effective 21 April at 00:00 UTC, the fees for all Equity Perpetual contracts will be updated to a standard base fee of 5 bps (0.05%). Both Maker and Taker fees will be set at 0.05% and discounts will be applied based on your fee tier. All changes will remain in effect until further notice. Below is a list of all affected contracts. If you have any questions please contact Support .
